description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a slim build, dressed in a coordinated tracksuit featuring a hooded top and matching pants. The tracksuit is adorned with bold, contrasting panels and visible seam details, giving it a modern, sporty appearance. The figure has shoulder-length hair styled in a loose, side-parted manner. On the feet are whimsical animal-themed slippers, adding a playful touch to the otherwise athletic outfit. The hands are relaxed and open at the sides, and the overall stance is upright and neutral. The figure's proportions and attire suggest a casual, urban context suitable for city streets or parks.
description: A stylized adult in a modern tracksuit with animal slippers and shoulder-length hair, standing upright. The outfit is sporty with playful footwear, suited for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full tracksuit, facial features, and both animal slippers clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the side seam of the tracksuit, and the slipper's side details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tracksuit, hair length, and the slippers from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and seam details on the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic tracksuit with hooded top and matching pants, featuring seam details
attribute_hairstyle: shoulder-length straight hair with side part
